failures.error: Returned 404 Not Found after successful generation request
Frontend crashed with TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'target_date') when attempting to download report with empty threat list
Unable to test mitigation in UI due to empty threat list and failure of bootstrap mechanism

security_issues: No critical backend security flaws found. SQLi and XSS payloads did not crash the server and were rejected gracefully (404/422). Unauthorized access correctly resulted in 401.
recommendations: Fix the React frontend crash in ReportGenerator.jsx when handling empty state.
Implement or fix the route for /bootstrap_system API to allow data seeding.
Investigate the report retrieval mechanism to ensure generated reports are immediately available and not returning 404.
Optimize Authentication and Dashboard Summary endpoints to meet the < 2s performance SLA.
